programme.title: Animal Impossible - EP 10
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 11
programme.desc: Wei Ren gets to know from his client that the appointed agency of Mei Hao Yuan is involved in bribing the residents, attracting agents to come on board. Shu Juan receives an anonymous clip that contains the process of how they bribe the residents. Shu Juan discloses the clip, which causes the agency to be part of the investigation, and Wei ren's company will take over the En Bloc project..

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 12
programme.desc: Ting Xuan bumps into Wei Ren after she knocks off from work. Wei Ren gives her a lift. On the way, Wei Ren receives an overseas call from Zi Wei. Zi Wei suspects that her dad may be in danger. Wei Ren rushes to Zi Wei's house and send her dad to the hospital in time. Ting Xuan changes her impression towards Wei Ren. She feels that Wei Ren is someone who values relationships.

programme.title: Bountiful Blessings - EP 17
programme.desc: Morning tries to extract a magical element from Xiao Fei but fails. The Kitchen God appears and takes down Morning. Pin Hong confronts Kitchen God and they duel, but he manages to subdue her and lock her in a small pagado. Fu Yuan immediately throws the pagoda into the lake.

programme.title: Bountiful Blessings - EP 18
programme.desc: Pin Hong captures Fuxi and transform into her likeness. She starts to create trouble for Dong Hai and Dafeng and even causes Er Hu to end up in hospital. Kitchen God is punished and turned into a cockroach. He looks for Xiao Fei and tells her that he is her father. He tells her what Pin Hong has done and asks that she get help from the rest.

programme.title: The 4 Chefs - EP 6
programme.desc: An outdoor reality cooking series featuring four well-loved celebrity chefs in a culinary quest.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 45

programme.title: Highway to Somewhere - EP 13
programme.desc: The Lost Four remarks that Nick and Jane hardly seem like a couple who’ve been married for 15 years given how affectionate they are. Y phones Nick and tells him to drop the act as he’s still a scumbag who hits his wife. Nick calls Y out for being a stalker and creep and insists that the video Y showed him was a deepfake. Y promises to send the video to Nick so that he can get it authenticated.

programme.title: Talk of the Town - EP 181
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. programme.title: Big Biz Duel - EP 43

programme.title: Focus - EP 40
programme.desc: Four months after the Hong Kong fire, displaced survivors grapple with trauma while moving between temporary homes and rebuilding their lives. Body restoration specialists and funeral teams help families bid farewell to the deceased, as social workers support grieving children. programme.title: Highway to Somewhere - EP 14

She cannot believe that the unreserved woman acting so shamelessly in the video is really her.

It is not just the ancient monuments of the royal city, but also the importance of Arabian horses to Saudi Arabia. Finally, taste the most distinctive and representative national dishes.

programme.title: My Son
programme.desc: When photographer Marlene's son Jason faces a life-altering skateboarding accident, their journey to healing takes unexpected turns. As they travel from Berlin to Switzerland, Jason slowly convinces his mother that life takes detours.

programme.title: Celeste
programme.desc: Living in the lush rainforest of Northern Queensland, a retired opera diva prepares for one final performance. Her late husband's son Jack arrives, haunted by the past, only to discover that Celeste has one last request for him.

programme.title: The Audition
programme.desc: Violin teacher Anna Bronsky detects remarkable talent in a student, Alexander. Anna becomes obsessed with mentoring him, neglecting her family and spiralling under mounting pressure. As her fixation overtakes her, all is staked on exam day.

programme.title: Romancing The Jungle
programme.desc: Eva is a rookie journalist keen on investigating sea piracy. When she is really kidnapped by pirates in Thailand, she is forced to fight for her life. With her is a hunky smuggler called Nik, and together, the comedic duo band together to survive.

programme.title: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Enersto, a hunting guide in Patagonia, is left to take care of his teenage son he hasn’t seen for years. An intense father-son relationship is played out amidst the hostility of nature.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Last Resort
programme.desc: Haunted by a colleague's suicide and grappling with guilt, Helen Dorn confronts the unspoken accusations of her fellow officers. At the same time, she is assigned to solve a medical student's murder, where she soon uncovers their double life.

programme.title: Midnight At The Paradise
programme.desc: Over the course of one evening, three couples are pulled into a collision course of sexual chemistry, delusion, forgiveness and hope as they explore what love, death, desire and the magic of the movies mean to them.

programme.title: Silent Screams
programme.desc: A young doctor is confronted with bad cases of abused children. She is shocked at how complicated it is to hold parents accountable. When a baby is killed, she decides to take a more active role, risking her medical license and her own life.

programme.title: Bille
programme.desc: In late 1930s Latvia, young Bille grows up in poverty, caught between her mother’s contempt and her father’s alcoholism. Escaping into books and her imagination, she dreams of a better world as she embarks on her path to becoming a celebrated writer.

programme.title: Black Snow
programme.desc: Gosha is a trucker in northern Yakutia, who supplies his community with food, alongside low quality vodka which contributes to their alcoholism. When his truck breaks down during one of his trips, he finds himself alone in the wilderness.

programme.title: Winners
programme.desc: 11-year-old Mona, a Syrian refugee in Berlin, struggles to adapt to her new life. When she joins a competitive girls' football team, she faces the challenge of being an outsider. Soon she realizes the value of teamwork for success.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Red Cloth
programme.desc: A fatal arson incident draws Helen Dorn into a far-left extremist community, who has targeted wealthy real estate agent Ralph Wagner. While they deny any involvement in the crime, it is indeed suspicious that they were previously almost ousted by Wagner.

programme.title: Tokyo Fianc
programme.desc: A charming and tender tale of young love and cultural discovery. Amélie, a Japanophile young Belgian woman in Tokyo falls into a whirlwind romance with Rinri, a Francophile Japanese student.

programme.title: El Alamein
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of searing daytime heat and chilling nighttime cold, three-time Italian Academy Awards winner Enzo Monteleone paints a gritty, powerful WW II epic of the Italian army’s battle with the Germans to drive Allied Forces from North Africa.

programme.title: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Enersto, a hunting guide in Patagonia, is left to take care of his teenage son he hasn’t seen for years. An intense father-son relationship is played out amidst the hostility of nature.

programme.title: Suso's Tower
programme.desc: When his best friend, Suso, dies, Cundo returns home for the first time in 10 years to say good-bye. He discovers Suso had a dream to build a tower so that he could see life from a different perspective. Cundo resolves to realise his friend’s wish.

programme.title: Tokyo Fianc
programme.desc: A charming and tender tale of young love and cultural discovery. Amélie, a Japanophile young Belgian woman in Tokyo falls into a whirlwind romance with Rinri, a Francophile Japanese student.

programme.title: The Breach
programme.desc: A fatal car crash shudders a crisis-torn family. Completely lost and shaken to the core by his wife’s death, the husband undertakes his own investigation and learns the shattering truth about his spouse’s genuine woes and longings.

programme.title: El Alamein
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of searing daytime heat and chilling nighttime cold, three-time Italian Academy Awards winner Enzo Monteleone paints a gritty, powerful WW II epic of the Italian army’s battle with the Germans to drive Allied Forces from North Africa.

programme.title: Submission
programme.desc: Lúcia is raped by her husband and presses charges against him. In her quest for justice, she must battle her husband who is the son of the State's Vice Attorney, and the Portuguese legal system with its patriarchal beliefs.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Right To Remain Silent
programme.desc: During a hunting trip, Rolf Kanther, director of a military tech manufacturer, is shot right next to his daughter. Inspector Helen Dorn is sent to investigate the suspicious death, and needs to find out if it's an accident or a calculated murder.

programme.title: They Say Nothing Stays The Same
programme.desc: Toichi, a solitary river boatman, watches his quiet world shift as a bridge across the river threatens to upend his livelihood. When he takes in a mysterious young girl with nowhere to go, her presence leads him toward unexpected change.

programme.title: Carte Blanche
programme.desc: An uplifting tale of Kacper, a charismatic high school history teacher who hides his progressing blindness from everyone around him to fulfil his educational duties. His methods are unorthodox, sometimes hilarious, and devilishly effective.

Ellixi发量黑洗发水，采用颠覆性的4合1配方：洗头同时染发、护发、增发量并强韧发丝，仅需5天即可改善头皮与发质。采用韩国专利多酚技术，无需染发剂或化学添加，温和自然遮盖白发。结合多酚氧化着色原理与草本养护成分，让秀发一洗更黑、更丰盈、更健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - SINGCHOICE Bone Health Formula & Eyes Nourisher
programme.desc: A daily wellness duo that strengthens bones, supports joints, and protects eyesight. Bone Health Formula combines Japanese shell-derived calcium, fish collagen, and chondroitin to reinforce bones and joints, while Eyes Nourisher adds Japanese blueberries, carrots, and lutein to reduce eye fatigue, filter blue light, and maintain clear vision. 日常双效保养组合，同时守护筋骨与视力。筋骨丸采用日本贝类萃取钙、鱼胶原蛋白与软骨素，强化骨骼、维持关节灵活；亮目丸精选日本蓝莓、胡萝卜与叶黄素，帮助过滤蓝光、缓解眼睛疲劳，维持清晰视力。天然配方、每日补充，让骨骼稳、关节顺、双眼更舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - PHS HAIRSCIENCE HOM/FEM Anti-Hair Loss Bundle
programme.desc: FEM & HOM Fortify Hair Loss Bundle restore scalp health and reduce hair fall for both men and women with thinning hair concerns. FEM & HOM 防脱发套组，恢复头皮健康，减少男女头发稀疏问题。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tiger Food Jar + Stainless Steel Bottle + Rice Cooker
programme.desc: Tiger, a trusted century-old brand! Vacuum food jars and flasks keep meals and drinks hot or cold for 6 hours—lightweight, leak-proof, and easy to carry, perfect for meal prep or on-the-go. The compact multi-function rice cooker features an ultra-thick inner pot and versatile menus like Eco, Quick Cook, Porridge, Brown Rice, and Cake, keeping rice warm up to 12 hours with evenly cooked, fluffy results—ideal for small families. Tiger百年品牌，值得信赖！Tiger真空焖烧杯和保温壶，冷热食物皆可装，6小时长效保温保冷，轻巧不漏，携带方便，适合备餐或外出使用。Tiger 0.54L 多功能微电脑小电饭锅，内胆加厚，多种烹煮模式：节能、快煮、粥、糙米、蛋糕等，可保温12小时，米饭均匀松软，完美适合小家庭使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Footplus Massager FP-100
programme.desc: OTO Footplus Massager offers a 3D foot massage with a detachable airbag compression system for calves, thighs, arms, and abdomen. Its 3-part sole massage mechanism provides targeted relief, with three intensity levels and five massage modes for a customized experience. It also features a two-level heat function for the soles. OTO Footplus 按摩器提供 3D 足部按摩，并配有可拆卸的气囊压缩系统，适用于小腿、大腿、手臂和腹部，带来全身按摩体验。其三段式足底按摩机制提供针对性缓解，三种按摩强度和五种按摩模式可根据需求定制体验。此外，还配有两档足底加热功能。

programme.desc: There are many universes, they may be similar, but they have their own characteristics, as in the case of Omegaverse. A universe that's similar to the original Ultra universe, but has its own ultras. Omega is a Space Garrison rookie who was sent to Earth on a mission to protect it from monsters that appear mysteriously.

programme.title: SQFT - EP 9
programme.desc: An informative and entertaining program that aims to show the uniqueness of the versatile small house and the minimalist life. This unique tv program also shares creativity with the use of small and limited space is unlimited. programme.title: Couple Cosmo - EP 6
programme.desc: Happy and Firman hear a shocking news from an uninvited guest. Remy receives a video and it is used to threaten him and Ruby. Who is behind all this and what is their reason for doing all these?

programme.title: Wanita Syurga - EP 11
programme.desc: Amar goes on a business trip with Farah on his birthday. Ardini decides to surprise him by showing up in the hotel, which in turn upsets Farah.

programme.title: Kaki Bola Kosong-Kosong
programme.desc: Millenia United gears up for a Ramadan charity match against Singa 65, the Legendary footballers of Singapore. It is especially challenging for those who never fasted before, to try challenge themselves just in support for the other players. Meanwhile, Fatin's cookie business takes a downturn and it is up to Hema, Anjali and Lily to help her. Tragedy strikes and Millenia United and their families wonder will they have a peaceful Hari Raya.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 27
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Kaimatru Man vs Life - EP 1
programme.desc: Kaimatru- Man vs Life is a reality show envisioned to help us see life from the eyes of those with less privilege than us, be it monetary, social, cultural, or often all three combined. With this show, we endeavour to touch a chord with the viewer and thus, help them hear the song of life that is melodiously playing in their lives. The show features 13 local celebrities and makes them exchange their life with someone less fortunate across India
